name: view_1
SQL: CREATE VIEW view_1 AS SELECT crop_production_data.District, crop_production_data.Season, crop_production_data.Yield (quintals), crop_production_data.Year, water_usage_data.Irrigation_Method, water_usage_data.Water_Consumption per_hectare, soil_analysis_data.Nitrogen_Content_per_ha, soil_analysis_data.Phosphorus_Content_per_ha FROM crop_production_data JOIN water_usage_data ON crop_production_data.District = water_usage_data.District AND crop_production_data.Crop = water_usage_data.Crop JOIN soil_analysis_data ON crop_production_data.District = soil_analysis_data.District AND crop_production_data.Crop = soil_analysis_data.Crop

name: view_2
SQL: CREATE VIEW view_2 AS SELECT view_1.District, view_1.Crop, view_1.Yield (quintals), view_1.Irrigation_Method, view_1.Water_Consumption_per_hectare, view_1.Nitrogen_Content_per_ha, view_1.Phosphorus_Content_per_ha FROM view_1 JOIN crop_production_data ON view_1.District = crop_production_data.District AND view_1.Crop = crop_production_data.Crop

name: view_3
SQL: CREATE VIEW view_3 AS SELECT view_1.Yield (quintals), view_1.Area (hectares), view_1.Irrigation_Method, view_1.Water_Consumption_per_hectare, view_1.Nitrogen_Content_per_ha, view_1.Phosphorus_Content_per_ha FROM view_1 JOIN crop_production_data ON view_1.District = crop_production_data.District AND view_1.Crop = crop_production_data.Crop

name: view_4
SQL: CREATE VIEW view_4 AS SELECT view_1.Water-Consumption_per_hectare, view_1.Yield (quintals) FROM view_1 JOIN crop_production_data ON view_1.District = crop_production_data.District AND view_1.Crop = crop_production_data.Crop

name: view_5
SQL: CREATE VIEW view_5 AS SELECT view_1.Nitrogen_Content_per_ha, view_1.Phosphorus_Content_per_ha, view_1.Yield (quintals) FROM view_1 JOIN crop_production_data ON view_1.District = crop_production_data.District AND view_1.Crop = crop_production_data.Crop

name: view_6
SQL: CREATE VIEW view_6 AS SELECT view_1.Production (metric tons), view_1.Yield (quintals), view_1.Season FROM view_1 JOIN crop_production_data ON view_1.District = crop_production_data.District AND view_1.Crop = crop_production_data.Crop
